sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports difficulty remembering to take blood pressure medication and reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports chest pain. The patient reports pain.
medical_concepts: difficulty remembering to take blood pressure medication

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor wants the patient to record their blood pressures. The patient will continue on lisinopril. The doctor wants the patient to take lisinopril as directed.

medical_concepts: difficulty remembering to take blood pressure medication
